channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump's small-dollar donor fundraising is beset by confusion and fatigue
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Donald Trump’s contributions from small-dollar donors have plummeted since his last White House campaign, presenting the former president with a financial challenge as he tries to keep pace with the Democrats' fundraising machine.
item.dc:creator: DAN MERICA, AARON KESSLER and RICHARD LARDNER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 5 takeaways from the Arizona Senate debate
item.description: Rep. Ruben Gallego (D-Ariz.) and Republican candidate Kari Lake faced off in their only debate in the Arizona Senate race on Wednesday, as the two contenders frequently traded barbs. Gallego and Lake, who are vying for retiring Sen. Kyrsten Sinema’s (I-Ariz.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, NewsNation

item.title: Republican NY-18 candidate Alison Esposito says America doesn’t have a gun problem
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Alison Esposito, a Republican candidate running for Congress in New York’s 18th District, said she does not support a ban on assault weapons and that America doesn’t have a gun problem. Esposito made the comments during a debate against Democratic U.S. Rep.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, PIX 11

item.title: VP Harris covers mouth, says ‘it’s a live broadcast’ after stumbling through Hurricane Milton speech
item.description: During a meeting with officials on Hurricane Milton, Vice President Harris stumbled through a speech and later covered her mouth and said, "It's a live broadcast.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden condemns ‘un-American’ 'lies' about federal storm response as Hurricane Milton nears Florida
item.description: President Joe Biden blasted his predecessor for spreading an “onslaught of lies” about how the federal government is handling the damage from Hurricane Helene as another hurricane, Milton, was on the verge of making landfall in Florida.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert And Josh Boak, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Pat Ryan, Alison Esposito face off in NY-18 debate on PIX11
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Democratic U.S. Rep. Pat Ryan and Republican Alison Esposito, the two candidates running to represent New York's 18th Congressional District, faced off in a debate on PIX11 Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, PIX 11

item.title: A federal judge will hear more evidence on whether to reopen voter registration in Georgia
item.description: At least for now, a federal judge won’t order the state of Georgia to reopen voter registration for November’s elections.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Amy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: House Democrats' campaign chief defends vulnerable members keeping distance from Harris
item.description: NEW YORK — Rep. Suzan DelBene (D-Wash.), the House Democrats’ campaign chief, is defending vulnerable lawmakers who have kept their distance from Vice President Harris while campaigning.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas lawmakers signal openness to expanding film incentive program
item.description: Directors, producers and actors say better incentives in other states pull projects away from Texas, which is losing out on millions of dollars.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Pooja Salhotra, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump campaigns in 'make or break' Pennsylvania
item.description: Former President Trump barnstormed Pennsylvania on Wednesday as he and his campaign have made clear the commonwealth could make or break his chances of winning in November. Trump held rallies in President Biden’s hometown of Scranton and in Reading.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Supreme Court seems likely to give Oklahoma death row inmate a new day in court
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court appeared likely Wednesday to give Oklahoma death row inmate Richard Glossip at least another day in court in his long quest to throw out his murder conviction and death sentence.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump will hold a rally at Madison Square Garden in the race's final stretch
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Donald Trump is returning to New York in the race’s final stretch, scheduling a rally at the city's iconic Madison Square Garden. Trump is planning his event for Oct.
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brown says no to pro-Palestinian students' demands for divestment
item.description: Supporters of divestment ended their encampment last spring in exchange for a promise that their proposal for divestment would get a vote from the board this fall.
item.dc:creator: Tovia Smith, MPR News

item.title: How to watch the NY-18 Debate: Ryan vs. Esposito
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Candidates in the race for New York’s 18th Congressional District will face off in a debate Wednesday night. Democratic incumbent Congressman Pat Ryan will take on Republican challenger Alison Esposito in a 60-minute debate moderated by PIX11’s Henry Rosoff.
item.dc:creator: Dominique Jack, PIX 11

item.title: Michigan Senate candidates clash on national security, immigration and abortion
item.description: U.S. Senate candidates Rep. Elissa Slotkin, D-Mich., and former GOP Congressman Mike Rogers faced off at a debate in Grand Rapids on Tuesday, clashing on several issues.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Military board substantiates misconduct but declines to fire Marine who adopted Afghan orphan
item.description: CAMP LEJEUNE, N.C. (AP) — A U.S. Marine whose adoption of an Afghan war orphan has spurred a yearslong legal battle and raised alarms at the highest levels of government will remain on active duty. A three-member panel of Marines said Tuesday that while Maj.
item.dc:creator: JULIET LINDERMAN, CLAIRE GALOFARO and MARTHA MENDOZA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lake blames Gallego for border woes, he vows to protect abortion rights in Arizona Senate debate
item.description: Republican Senate candidate Kari Lake repeatedly reminded debate viewers of her three-decade career on Arizona television, looking to harness the connection she built with voters and overcome Democrat Ruben Gallego’s portrayal of her as a liar.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan J. Cooper, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump lashes out at Harris and 'The View' co-hosts, as Hurricane Milton makes landfall
item.description: Former President Donald Trump has hurled insults at his rival, Vice President Kamala Harris, and the co-hosts of ABC's “The View.”.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: FBI arrests Afghan man who officials say planned Election Day attack in the US
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The FBI has arrested an Afghan man who officials say was inspired by the Islamic State militant organization and was plotting an Election Day attack targeting large crowds in the U.S., the Justice Department said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Democrats discuss party disillusionment, donor culture
item.description: "I went to the DNC hoping to feel reinspired. I really, really did," former Democratic campaign fundraiser Evan Barker said.
item.dc:creator: Chris Cuomo, NewsNation

item.title: Lombardo among GOP governors criticizing Biden-Harris immigration asylum actions
item.description: Gov. Joe Lombardo was among 25 Republican governors who signed a letter criticizing the Biden-Harris administration over asylum policies that have brought more than a half-million immigrants into the United States.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: WATCH: Candidates for Las Vegas Mayor face off in a debate ahead of Election Day
item.description: Las Vegas Mayoral candidates Shelley Berkley and Victoria Seaman will face off in a debate on Tuesday, hosted by 8 News Now, with the winner taking over the non-partisan office from Oscar Goodman, who served as mayor from 1999 to 2011.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Harris, Walz appeared on ABC's 'The View' and 'Jimmy Kimmel Live'
item.description: The Democratic presidential ticket is on a media blitz in New York. Vice President Kamala Harris appeared Tuesday on ABC's “The View," and her running mate, Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz appeared on ABC's “Jimmy Kimmel Live” on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Trump, Harris look to score points amid Helene response
item.description: Once considered a political-free zone, disaster relief has become fair game for campaign point scoring on both sides of the aisle.
item.dc:creator: Joe Khalil, NewsNation

item.title: Trump mass deportation plan embraced by some border sheriffs
item.description: Speaking exclusively to NewsNation last week, Trump detailed why he would utilize the expertise of local authorities for his deportation plans.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Fact checking falsehoods about FEMA funding and Hurricane Helene
item.description: Rumors, misinformation and lies about the federal government’s response to Hurricane Helene have run rampant since the storm made landfall, especially around FEMA funding.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Fowler, MPR News

item.title: Cruz posts $21 million fundraising haul in battle with Allred
item.description: Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) raked in $21 million in the third fundraising quarter of 2024, he announced Monday. Cruz’s team said in a statement that the total includes money raised by his reelection campaign, political action committee and joint fundraising committee.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Supreme Court won’t hear Pennsylvania legislators' challenge to executive actions expanding voting access
item.description: The Supreme Court decided Monday it won’t take up a case to restore a lawsuit by Pennsylvania Republicans that challenged executive actions expanding voting access on the basis that only state legislatures can regulate federal elections.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5

item.title: Major North Carolina newspaper knocks Trump over Helene response 'falsehoods'
item.description: A leading newspaper in North Carolina is blasting former President Donald Trump over what it calls his "falsehoods" about the government response to Hurricane Helene, which devastated large swaths of the state last week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: Minnesota Republicans seek a reset after two years of DFL trifecta in St. Paul
item.description: All 134 Minnesota House seats are on the ballot this fall, along with one state Senate seat. The results could flip political control of the Legislature.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Trump's plan would add $4 trillion more to U.S. debt compared to Harris', analysis says
item.description: Neither former President Donald Trump nor Vice President Kamala Harris have plans to fix the national debt, risking "an eventual fiscal crisis," a budget nonprofit group found in its analysis.
item.dc:creator: Luke Garrett, MPR News

item.title: Trump returns to site of attempted assassination, honors shooting victims
item.description: Former President Donald Trump is returning Saturday to the site of his attempted assassination with a rally in Butler County.
item.dc:creator: Patty Coller, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump returns to rally crowd in Butler, Pa., site of July assassination attempt
item.description: The former President spoke at a campaign rally in the same location that a bullet grazed his ear in July. The shooter killed a man and injured two other people.
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman, MPR News

item.title: Florida voters concerned about election disruptions after Hurricane Helene
item.description: Polling sites along the coast have lost locations due to Hurricane Helene's damage, and Florida voters are starting to worry about how this could change things for the 2024 election.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Politics over Humanity? How Hurricane Helene impacts the political field
item.description: Politics over Humanity? How Hurricane Helene impacts the Political field as the race to the White House is weeks away.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC
